description: Georgia Primary Intelligence Dashboard — Pre-fetched Data Manifest
note: This file is populated by running: node scripts/run-pipeline.mjs. Until then it lists no available datasets.

instructions.fetch_sos: Run `node scripts/fetch-sos.mjs` to download Georgia SOS results. Requires Node.js 18+.
instructions.fetch_census: Run `node scripts/fetch-census.mjs` to download Census population data.
instructions.full_pipeline: Run `node scripts/run-pipeline.mjs` to execute all fetch steps and update this manifest.
